title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 359.191 - Voting rights of limited partners
text:
359.191.  Voting rights of limited partners. — Subject to section 359.201, the partnership agreement may grant to all or a specified group of the limited partners the right to vote (on a per capita or other basis) upon any matter.
(L. 1985 H.B. 512 & 650) 
Effective 1-01-87
